metadata.name: Create a Project Cash Flow Projection

description: A PM needs to create a cash flow projection to show the expected timing of expenses and client payments throughout the project.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the cost-loaded project schedule, which shows the expected spending over time.
Retrieve the client payment schedule from the prime contract.

expected_outcome.value: The schedule of client payments is retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Generate a cash flow curve by plotting the cumulative expenses against the cumulative income over the project timeline.

expected_outcome.value: A cash flow projection graph is created, highlighting periods of negative cash flow.
